phase-plan.purpose: Make space construction explicit and editable by replacing static feature panels with per-space feature vectors and a focused feature-definition modal.
phase-plan.scope: Space Explorer controls and content projection logic only: remove Behavior Lens panel, merge Fame/Awareness/Guile into space-feature vectors, keep movement controls with assignable features.

file.description: Add space-feature registry, modal authoring flow, movement-vector feature assignment, and default vectorized plotting for content spaces.
Track 44-09 loop task and command evidence.

task.description: Remove Behavior Lens and redundant content/navigation vector panels.
Add top-level feature-definition popup and assignment to selected content spaces.
Keep movement controls and support movement-vector feature assignment using the same authoring workflow.

decision.summary: Space vectors are authored per space via assigned feature sets, with shared features allowing cross-space visualization overlap.
decision.impact: Improves model transparency and supports iterative feature-space design without hardcoding static panels.
